prompt: Continuing from previous scene. Same high-end conference room, same lighting and furniture. The same 26-year-old Chinese male startup founder Zhao Yang (tall, thin, short black hair, same dark navy blue suit with crooked tie, but now his sleeves are unconsciously rolled up slightly — showing battle mode) hands his smartphone to the nearest investor. The investor (50s Chinese male, silver-streaked hair, expensive suit) takes the phone curiously and starts swiping the screen. His eyebrows first furrow then rise with interest. The investor next to him leans over to look. Zhao Yang stands with hands casually in his pockets, but we can see his fist clenched tight from the side angle. The lead investor looks up from the phone with an impressed expression. The investors begin whispering to each other. The lead investor puts the phone down and looks at Zhao Yang. He pauses, then opens his mouth to speak — the frame freezes on Zhao Yang's tense side profile, eyes widening. Cliffhanger ending. Shot from his left side, medium to medium-wide. Same warm conference room lighting. Anime digital animation style. Normal speed movement, natural pacing. All dialogue must finish by second 14, leaving at least 1 second of silence at the end. No subtitles, no slow motion, no facing camera directly. 9:16 vertical.
